title: Upcoming community event all about monday AI!
excerpt:
Learn all about our soon-to-be-released AI capabilities! Join us for another LIVE community event with monday AI product managers Or Fridman and Vlad Mystetsky  June 1st at 9am CEST/ 5pm AEST  & 5pm CEST/ 11am EST 
What …

posts.author: Julietteb (Juliette )
posts.cookedHtml:
Learn all about our soon-to-be-released AI capabilities! Join us for another LIVE community event with monday AI product managers Or Fridman and Vlad Mystetsky June 1st at 9am CEST/ 5pm AEST & 5pm CEST/ 11am EST

What is monday AI?
In case you haven’t heard yet, we are getting ready to launch monday AI assistant which will include a collection of innovative apps built internally on the same monday AI assistant infrastructure where external developers will be able to build apps for the monday marketplace. Read more about it here.

What will happen at this event?
Or and Vlad will take our community behind the scenes of monday AI. Learn about why we decided to create AI capabilities and what this means for the future of board management! Get your questions ready since there will also be an opportunity for Q&A.

The power of monday AI (1)1920×1920 114 KB

posts.author: MarkHHH (Mark Laurence)
posts.cookedHtml: VERY excited about this! I can’t make it live due to incompatible international time zone. Can a recording be made available please?

posts.author: Julietteb (Juliette )
posts.cookedHtml: Hi Mark! We unfortunately dont record our community event with product managers. We will be having more in the future and hope you will be able to make them.

posts.author: MarkHHH (Mark Laurence)
posts.cookedHtml:
Will some kind of meeting summary be released or product video summary?

Kind regards,
